join.errorBadCode: That code didn't work. Check it and try again.

lobby.title: Party
lobby.waitingHostPick: Waiting for the host to pick a game…
lobby.waitingHostStart: Waiting for the host to start…
lobby.kicked: You were removed from the party.
lobby.errorStart: Couldn't start the game. Please try again.
lobby.needPlayers: This game needs at least {{count}} players.

hattrick.title: Hattrick
hattrick.tagline: Football trivia × three in a row

rules: On your turn, name a footballer who fits both the row and the column of a cell.
Claim three cells in a row to win.
Stuck? Skip your turn or propose a tie that everyone agrees to.

redCard.title: Red Card
redCard.tagline: One of you is faking it. Send them off.

rules: Everyone but the faker is given the same footballer.
Over two rounds, take turns questioning each other, then vote on who to send off.
Sent off as the faker? Name the footballer to steal the win back.

scout.title: Scout
scout.tagline: Guess today's player in six tries

rules: Guess the daily footballer in six tries.
After each guess, every column turns green for a match, yellow if close, and grey if wrong.
A new footballer drops every day, the same for everyone.

hattrick.title: Hattrick

help.rule: Name a footballer who matches both the row and the column of a cell.
help.tapHint: Not sure what a category means? Tap it on the grid to see.

hattrick.notMatch: That player doesn't fit, so your turn passes.

redCard.title: Red Card

help.title: How to play
help.rule: Everyone but the faker is given the same footballer. Over two rounds, take turns asking one another a question, then vote on who to send off. Sent off as the faker? Guess the footballer to steal it back.

role.imposterBody: You weren't given a player. Blend in, bluff your answers, and avoid the red card.

redCard.askOutLoud: Ask anyone a question out loud.
redCard.yourTurnAsk: Ask {{name}} your question, then tap Done

vote.title: Who should be sent off?
vote.readySub: Ready to decide who to send off?
vote.hint: Tap the player you think was bluffing.
vote.voted: Vote cast. Waiting for the others…

reveal.caught: Sent off! The group found the faker.
reveal.escaped: The faker stayed on the pitch.

redeem.prompt: You were sent off. Guess the footballer to steal it back.
redeem.waiting: Waiting for {{name}} to guess the footballer…

redCard.searchHint: Start typing to search a footballer
redCard.errorVote: Couldn't cast your vote. Try again.
redCard.errorGuess: Couldn't submit your guess. Try again.

scout.title: Scout
scout.searchHint: Start typing to guess a footballer
scout.lockedUntilTomorrow: Come back tomorrow for a new footballer

help.title: How to play
help.rule: Guess the day's player in six tries. After each guess, every column turns green if it matches, yellow if it's close, and grey if it's wrong.
help.arrows: The arrow on Shirt points toward the secret player's number.
help.daily: A new footballer drops every day, the same for everyone.

legend.title: How the grid works
legend.intro: Name a footballer who matches both the row and the column of a cell. Here's what each axis on this grid means.

meaning.topLeagues: Has played in {{value}}+ of the top five leagues

bug.title: Report a bug
bug.desc: Tell us what went wrong, and what you were doing.
bug.error: Couldn't send your report. Please try again.

update.title: Update Miflo
update.body: You're on an older version of Miflo. Update to the latest version to keep playing with your friends.

settings.title: Settings
settings.hapticsDesc: Vibrations on taps and key moments.

stats.title: Stats
stats.comingSoonDesc: Your wins, streaks and favourite players will show up here.

aboutPage.title: About Miflo
aboutPage.blurb: Miflo is social party games for friends in the same room. Gather everyone, pick a game and play together.

howToPlay.title: How to play
howToPlay.intro: Most Miflo games are played together in the same room: one phone starts a party and everyone else joins with the code. Scout is a solo daily puzzle you can play on your own.
howToPlay.step1Desc: Tap Create a party to get a code, or Join a party and type a friend's code.
howToPlay.step2Desc: The host picks a game once at least two players have joined.
